messages.author: user
messages.content: cinepi.local opens on my iPhone but not on my Windows laptop.

messages.author: maintainer
messages.content: That usually points to mDNS/Bonjour support. Try the Pi IP address, check that both devices are on the same network, and verify avahi-daemon is running.

title: Private thread that should not ingest

messages.author: user
messages.content: Do not use this message in the KB.
